message:
test(mux_pool): add get_lines and get_pane_render_changes integration tests

Expand the mock MuxServer to handle GetLines PDU requests, returning
empty line sets for the requested pane. Add two new integration tests
exercising the pool's CX-aware API wrappers:

- pool_get_lines_with_cx_succeeds: verify get_lines_with_cx returns
  the correct pane_id and empty lines, confirming connection pooling
  and PDU routing work end-to-end
- pool_get_pane_render_changes_with_cx_succeeds: verify render change
  responses include expected dimension defaults (80x24)

Both tests are gated behind the asupersync-runtime feature flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
